title: Elytra Mace PVP Essentials
description: Elytra Mace PVP Essentials, to improve Elytra Mace gameplay!
body:
This resource pack adds Elytra Mace PVP Essentials, making Elytra Mace gameplay smoother and cleaner! This resource pack adds things such as definable mace enchantments, no wind burst or firework particles, and custom totem texture! 

REACH OUT TO ME!! 
Discord: ipickles20. *with the period*. 
For private elytra mace lessons, add me on Discord and the 'Essentials Mod' for Minecraft. 
My MC IGN is: PickleXVI

![Breach and Density Mace Textures (ANIMATED)]

(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5a61bc7f096cf69f56c7ae88b7a11c5e7a82611.png)

![No Particle Firework](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb4b6ee6a1a57c6dbf27c72429b4f7450eff950d.png)
